subcodes.first_line: O vigilant leaf! A jewel must needs have its essence, and a pearl its lustre, even as the shell of the pearl must possess divine favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منتبه کوهر را جوهر باید و لولو را لمعان شاید چون کوهر صدف الطافی باید
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God
